question: I have sudden severe chest pain that came on out of nowhere. It's tearing through to my back. What is this and what should I do right now?
My child just swallowed a small button battery. How urgent is this and what should I do?
I have sudden onset of the worst headache of my life. I've never felt anything like it before. Should I go to the ER?
My friend is having a seizure for the first time. They have no history of epilepsy. What should I do while waiting for help to arrive?
I think I may have taken too many acetaminophen pills a few hours ago. Should I go to the ER even if I feel okay right now?
Someone near me collapsed and is unresponsive. I can't tell if they are breathing. What do I do while waiting for an ambulance?
I was stung by something in the garden and now my throat feels tight and I'm having trouble swallowing. Is this an allergic reaction?
I have sudden painless vision loss in one eye that started an hour ago. Does this require emergency evaluation?
I cut my hand deeply while cooking and it is bleeding heavily. How do I tell if I need stitches or can I manage this at home?
My elderly parent fell and hit their head. They seem confused now. How serious is this and when do I call an ambulance?
I have severe abdominal pain in my lower right side that started suddenly. It's getting worse with movement. What could this be?
I've been vomiting blood. I don't know how much but the toilet bowl was red. Is this an emergency?
I have sudden weakness and drooping on one side of my face and my arm feels weak. What is happening and what should I do?
I'm having trouble breathing and my oxygen monitor shows 91%. I have asthma and used my inhaler but it's not helping. What now?
My toddler drank some cleaning product under the sink. I don't know how much. What do I do right now?
My blood sugar glucometer says HIGH — it won't give a number. I have type 1 diabetes and I feel sick. Is this an emergency?
I've had a fever of 40°C for two days and now I'm very confused and my neck is stiff. What could this be?
I stepped on a rusty nail. My last tetanus shot was over 10 years ago. Do I need to go to the ER?
I was in a car accident. The airbag went off and I hit my chest on the steering wheel. I feel okay but should I get checked out?
I have one-sided leg swelling and calf pain after a long flight. Could this be a blood clot and how urgently do I need to be seen?
My elderly parent is acting very confused and disoriented and has a bad smell to their urine. Could this be a serious infection?
I have a knife wound that is about 3 cm long on my forearm. It stopped bleeding with pressure. Do I need stitches?
I think I may have a broken finger. It's very swollen and I can't bend it. Do I need an X-ray or can I just buddy tape it?
I have an abscess on my leg that is red and swollen and feels like it has fluid inside. How do I know if I can manage this at home or need the ER?
I've taken opioid pain medication and now I feel very drowsy with slow breathing. What does this mean?
I have a known peanut allergy and accidentally ate something with peanuts. I don't feel bad yet. Should I use my EpiPen and go to the ER?
Someone I'm with is having a severe asthma attack and their inhaler isn't helping. Their lips are turning blue. What should I do?
I have sudden severe eye pain and my vision is blurry with halos around lights. Could this be a medical emergency?
I fell off a ladder and landed on my shoulder. I can't lift my arm. Is this a dislocation or fracture and what do I do?
My newborn baby (2 weeks old) has a fever of 38.2°C. Should I go to the ER immediately?
